description_long: This object is a pair of combination pliers featuring robust, blue ergonomic handles and a black metal head. The handles are slightly curved for comfort and appear to be coated with a rubberized or plastic material for improved grip. The jaws are broad and flat with a serrated gripping surface, and there is a cutting edge near the pivot for wire cutting. The pivot mechanism is a standard fixed joint, allowing the jaws to open and close smoothly. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for gripping, twisting, and cutting tasks commonly encountered in urban maintenance or repair work. No visible branding or logo is present on the handles or jaws.
description: A sturdy pair of blue-handled combination pliers with a black metal head, featuring serrated jaws and a wire cutter near the pivot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the pliers and the thickness of the handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the jaws, the serrated gripping surface, and the ergonomic blue handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the slim profile and handle curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jaws and the handles, mirroring the front but with less detail on the jaw surface.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handles with blue rubberized or plastic coating for insulation and grip.
attribute_jaw_design: Broad, flat jaws with serrated gripping surfaces and an integrated wire cutter near the pivot; standard combination pliers geometry.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint, non-adjustable, allowing standard opening and closing motion.
attribute_grip_pattern: Handles have a smooth, rubberized texture with slight ergonomic contouring for enhanced grip.
